response.justification: Sarah has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to distributed systems and telemetry via high-throughput services, but lacks explicit evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or AI-driven growth frameworks at scale — key requirements for the role. Her work in pricing optimization and GIS data systems shows analytical thinking, but not the cross-team leadership or measurement infrastructure design expected at Principal level.
strengths: Proven experience with high-scale distributed systems and low-latency services (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Broad technical fluency across languages (TypeScript, D, C++, Python) and platforms (Kubernetes, AWS, Docker)
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation frameworks, feature flighting, or guardrail systems
Limited visibility into metrics-driven decision-making or statistical analysis of experiments
Experience with AI tools or AI-first growth systems is implied but not demonstrated
